title: Weekend Flea Market
scene: 你在周末跳蚤市场淘旧货。

turns.en: Vintage lamp, forty dollars.
The shade is cracked. Would you take thirty?
Thirty-five. That's as low as I go.
Deal. Does the bulb work?

turns.cn: 昨天还亮着，你回家试试。
turns.en: It worked yesterday. Try it at home.
Cash only?
Yes. No card reader here.

title: Thrift Store
scene: 你在 Goodwill 二手店买衣服。

turns.en: Yellow tags are half off today.
How much is this coat?
Sixteen originally, eight with the discount.
Where's the fitting room?

turns.cn: 后面左边，一次最多五件。
turns.en: Back left. Five items at a time.
Can I return it?

turns.cn: 七天内凭小票可换，不退现金。
turns.en: Exchange within seven days with receipt. No cash refunds.

title: Garage Sale
scene: 你路过邻居的庭院旧货甩卖。

turns.cn: 随便看，都是家里不用的。
turns.en: Look around. It's all stuff we don't need.
How much for this bookshelf?
Twenty bucks. You carry it yourself.

turns.cn: 有点重，能帮我抬到车上吗？
turns.en: It's heavy. Could you help me load it?
Sure. My son's home.

turns.cn: 再加这把椅子，一共三十？
turns.en: Add this chair, thirty total?
Sounds good. Thanks!

title: Antique Negotiation
scene: 你在古董市场看一个老式收音机。

turns.cn: 五十年代收音机，还能响，一百二。
turns.en: Fifties radio, still works, a hundred twenty.

turns.cn: 外观磨损挺厉害，八十怎么样？
turns.en: It's pretty worn. How about eighty?
A hundred with the original knobs thrown in.

turns.cn: 我纯收藏，九十现金现在拿走。
turns.en: It's for display only. Ninety cash right now.
Ninety-five. Final price.
Deal.

turns.cn: 懂货，下次有新品通知你。
turns.en: You know your stuff. I'll let you know when I get more.

title: Selling Your Stuff
scene: 你在跳蚤市场租摊位卖自己的旧物。

turns.cn: 这双鞋多大码？看起来挺新。
turns.en: What size are these shoes? They look almost new.

turns.cn: 九码，只穿过两次，十五块。
turns.en: Size nine. Worn twice. Fifteen dollars.
Twelve cash?
Thirteen? That's already a steal.
Fine. Got a bag?
Yes, here you go.
Thanks!

title: Vintage Watch Deal
scene: 你在集市看中一块老式手表，深入砍价。

turns.cn: 七十年代欧米茄，走时准，三百五。
turns.en: Seventies Omega, keeps good time, three fifty.

turns.cn: 表蒙有划痕，机芯没保养记录。
turns.en: The crystal is scratched and there's no service history.

turns.cn: 可以自己抛光，机芯我听着没问题。
turns.en: You can polish it. The movement sounds fine to me.
Two eighty cash, right now.
Three twenty with an extra strap.
Three hundred. That's my final offer.
Alright. You know watches.
